meaning: n. 心智,灵魂,心灵,精神
examples: He portrays the psyche as polycentric.
She spent her life plumbing the mysteries of the human psyche.
His exploration of the myth brings insight into the American psyche.
It is not an easy task to tease a national psyche out of a landscape, a geological fact.
There is something in the American psyche that enjoys and wants to make stuff.
